---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ResearchOS
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why they didn't work for you.

## Out-of-scope check

ResearchOS deliberately does **not** pursue these directions:

- Multi-tenancy / multi-user / SSO / hosted cloud version
- Auto-submission to journals or preprint servers
- Replacing the package-freeze ZIP with a different distribution format
- Schema renames of the legacy `Student* / Mentor* / MentorshipSession` fields without a real migration plan

If your request lands in one of these, expect it to be closed unless you have a strong case. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#what-is-out-of-scope) for the rationale.
